justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misunderstood "this Sunday" as the upcoming Sunday, June 7th, instead of the current Sunday, May 31st, requiring clarification from the user.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered slots that were immediately unavailable, leading to a frustrating loop of rejections.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly offered slots that were immediately unavailable, leading to multiple unnecessary turns where the user had to re-request a booking.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was highly frustrating due to the agent repeatedly offering and failing to book available slots, leading to a sense of inefficiency and unreliability.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent failed to recover gracefully from repeated booking failures, continuing to offer and attempt to book unavailable slots without a more robust strategy for finding genuinely open times.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The core issue was the agent's inability to book any of the slots it presented as available, leading to a highly frustrating and unproductive conversation for the user.
